calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-18-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Dean Christopherson, Esq. for Plaintiff: CNH Capital America LLC, Successor to Case Credit Corp.
Plaintiff's Witness: Dex Brott, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Geotech Construction, Inc., Donovan Gilliland and Debbie Gilliland as follows:
Principal $31,657.68
Prejudgment Interest $13,717.66
Attorney's Fees $3,105.00
Late Fees $214.20
Collection Costs $673.00
Costs $320.00, for a total of $49,663.04 and possession of the Eqipment listed in the Judgment, see details of Judgment against each Defaulted Defendant in scanned doc.
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-04-2006 Continued To Aug-07-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
